title: erodium crassifolium subsp. hirtum
intro: Erodium crassifolium subsp. hirtum, also known as the hairy redstem storksbill, is a plant species that belongs to the Geranium family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Erodium crassifolium subsp. hirtum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
